ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_entities" (
  "entity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geospatial entity */,
  "coordx1" REAL /* X-coordinate of the geospatial entity */,
  "coordx2" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the geospatial entity */,
  "coordx3" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the geospatial entity */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the entity, if applicable */,
  "is_merged" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the entity is merged with others */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the entity is classified as special */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the geospatial entity (e.g., point, line, polygon) */,
  "entity_description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "entity_category" TEXT /* Category of the entity (e.g., natural, man-made) */,
  "entity_status" TEXT /* Status of the entity (e.g., active, inactive, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entity */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the entity */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the entity */,
  "parent_entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent entity (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_entities_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_entities_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite, survey) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., remote sensing, field survey) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint for the data source */,
  "source_license" TEXT /* License information for the data source */,
  "source_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the geospatial entity accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the entity */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the entity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the entity */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed (e.g., specific changes made) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES geospatial_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* ID of the geospatial entity this metadata is associated with */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source that contributed to this entity */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the entity was last updated */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "data_source_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES geospatial_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_metadata_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
